title: Membership Drive
subtitle: A membership drive aimed at onboarding students into the Optica community. It encouraged active participation and awareness about the society’s work. The event focused on building leadership skills and technical knowledge. It also promoted networking and long-term professional growth.
description:
Title of the event : Membership Drive 
 Objective: The objective of this event was to onboard members for the society. The students with their great enthusiasm reported and registered themselves for the BVP Optica Membership drive. The programme aimed to enhance students’ familiarity with the workings of our subchapter and the team behind it. They were informed that participating in an Optica student chapter will help them develop technical knowledge, leadership experience and lasting relationships
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: High enthusiasm and participation from students.
Detailed explanation of global Optica benefits.
Focus on leadership and technical growth opportunities.
Expansion of the society’s member base.
